title: Application to existing corporations
doc_html:
§215.   Application to existing corporations

A corporation organized under prior statutes may be brought under the provisions of this Chapter by an amendment of its charter, in accordance with its provisions and the laws under which it was incorporated.
doc_text:
§215.   Application to existing corporations
A corporation organized under prior statutes may be brought under the provisions of this Chapter by an amendment of its charter, in accordance with its provisions and the laws under which it was incorporated.
